Join IAAA
HomePTDC

Professional Training & Development Centre

Learn, Build, Intern - The IAAA Way

The PTDC delivers globally recognized diplomas, technical certifications, and industry internships for students and professionals. Every PTDC student is part of the IAAA Internship Network, gaining real industry experience and eligibility to pitch innovations at the IAAA Startup Forum.

Courses & Programs

Industry-aligned curriculum designed for career success

Featured Program
Degree

B.S. Program by IIT Madras

For +2/Grade 12, No JEE Required

Guided by IAAA's Academic Advisory Program. Focused on Data Science and Aerospace Applications.

4 Years
Diploma

Aircraft Maintenance Technician

One-Year Diploma

Globally accepted certification for MRO & AME careers.

1 Year
Diploma

AMT (Specialization: NDT)

One-Year Diploma

Level II Certification (UT, RT, PT, MT, VT) with assured job prospects.

1 Year
Diploma

Drone Architecture

One-Year Diploma

Drone Design, Assembly, Flight Operations, and Industry Use Cases.

1 Year
Training

Short-Term Training & Internships

Multiple Programs

Airline Operations, Drone Tech, AME, NDT, Composites, and Manufacturing.

3-6 Months
Training

Career-Focused NDT Training

Special Program

Job-ready courses with international Level II certification.

6 Months

Why Choose PTDC?

Global Certifications

Internationally recognized diplomas and certifications

Industry Internships

Real projects with leading aerospace companies

Skill-Based Learning

Career-linked, practical training programs

Startup Support

Path from idea to IAAA Startup Forum

Internships & Industry Pathway

Real projects with Drones, Airlines, MROs, UAV Startups, and Composite Manufacturers. Gain hands-on experience and build your career in aerospace.

Apply for Internship

Operations

  • PTDCs are hosted at IAAA Regional Hubs or Partner Institutions
  • Trainers approved by IAAA Academic & Industry Council
  • Transparent revenue model; supports local training & skill programs
  • Alignment with DGCA, NSDC, and International Standards

Ready to Start Your Aerospace Career?

Join PTDC and get access to world-class training, industry internships, and career support.

Enroll NowHost a PTDC Centre
IAAAAerospace Institute

Empowering India's Aerospace Community - From School to Sky.
